current_activity: Produce one frontend discovery brief that defines MVP user-facing behavior, lane boundaries, UI-facing integration assumptions, and unresolved questions for the React todo app without redefining shared contracts.
Fast-path discovery plan for React web frontend for creating, viewing, completing, editing, and deleting todo items: let the frontend manager produce the minimal task graph directly.

Single-task backend discovery lane plan to capture MVP service boundaries, backend-owned API scope, persistence decision space, and downstream handoff notes without expanding into design or implementation.
Fast-path discovery plan for Simple backend API and persistence layer for storing todo items: let the backend manager produce the minimal task graph directly.

Produce one middleware discovery bundle that captures the frontend-backend integration boundary, unresolved coordination questions, and a middleware-owned candidate integration contract for later phases.
Fast-path discovery plan for Basic application integration and delivery workflow connecting frontend and backend: let the middleware manager produce the minimal task graph directly.
